title: OCR — make scanned pages searchable
disclosure: OCR runs entirely on your device, which is slower and less accurate than cloud-based OCR services — recognizing a large document can take a while. Your file never leaves your browser.
languageHint: Pick the language(s) this document is written in.
privacyShort: Nothing is uploaded to any server.
progressSkipped: Page {{current}} of {{total}} — already has text, skipping…
failed: Something went wrong while running OCR.
